description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after Pikachu, a well-known character from the Pokémon franchise. The toy features a rounded yellow body with two large, pointed ears tipped in black, and a pair of small, black oval eyes with white highlights. Its cheeks are circular and red, and it has a small, smiling mouth. The arms are short and stubby, positioned outward, while the legs are small and slightly apart. The back displays two brown horizontal stripes and a large, jagged lightning bolt-shaped tail, characteristic of Pikachu. The surface appears soft and matte, with visible seams and a slightly squishy texture, suggesting it is filled with lightweight stuffing.
description: A soft, yellow Pikachu stuffed toy with black-tipped ears, red cheeks, and a lightning bolt-shaped tail. It has a rounded body, stubby limbs, and a cheerful facial expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing Pikachu's face, red cheeks, black-tipped ears, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the protruding ear, cheek, and the full zigzag shape of the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two brown stripes on the back and the attachment of the lightning bolt-shaped tail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ear, cheek, and the tail's zigzag profile from the opposite side.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with wide, open eyes and a small, smiling mouth. The red cheeks add to the playful and happy appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly outstretched and legs apart, giving a welcoming and energetic posture.
